summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing for Apple-inspired menu catalog page redesign. All 26 test cases passed on both desktop (1920px) and mobile (375px) viewports.
passed_tests: TEST 1: 'Our Menu.' heading renders correctly on desktop
TEST 2: Location selector (pill-shaped) found with MapPin icon
TEST 3: Site status pill shows 'Ordering Open' with green indicator
TEST 4: Track Order button found and visible
TEST 5: Login to Order button found and visible
TEST 6: All category tabs found (All 8, Breakfast 1, Lunch 4, Dinner 3, Dessert 2, Beverage 2)
TEST 7: Sort selector found (A-Z, Price Low, Price High)
TEST 8: 8 menu items loaded for Timperley location
TEST 9: Dessert category filter works (shows 2 items)
TEST 10: All category resets filter (shows 8 items)
TEST 11: Sort by Price Low works (Fresh Fruit Smoothie £7.99 first)
TEST 12: Sort by Price High works (Grilled Atlantic Salmon £34.99 first)
TEST 13: Add to cart works - button turns green, floating cart appears with count
TEST 14: Track Order button navigates to /order-status
TEST 15: Login to Order button navigates to /customer-auth
TEST 16: Location selector changes menu items (Timperley: 8 items → Howe Bridge: 6 items)
TEST 17: Sticky category bar stays visible on scroll with frosted glass backdrop
TEST 18: Heading visible on mobile (375px)
TEST 19: Location selector visible on mobile
TEST 20: Status pill visible on mobile
TEST 21: Category tabs have horizontal scroll container (overflow-x: auto)
TEST 22: 8 menu items visible on mobile
TEST 23: No horizontal overflow on mobile (body: 375px, viewport: 375px)
TEST 24: Sticky category bar visible after scroll on mobile
TEST 25: Menu item card has all elements (image, name, price, description, tags, prep time, + button)
TEST 26: Quick Add overlay visible on hover with glass-morphism effect
context_for_next_testing_agent: Apple-inspired menu catalog page testing completed. All features verified: (1) Hero section with 'Our Menu.' heading, location selector pill, status pill, Track Order and Login to Order buttons, (2) Sticky frosted-glass category bar with 6 category pills (All, Breakfast, Lunch, Dinner, Dessert, Beverage) and counts, (3) Sort dropdown (A-Z, Price Low, Price High), (4) Menu item cards with image, name, price, description, tags, prep time, dietary indicators (V, VG, GF), and + add button, (5) Quick Add glass overlay on hover, (6) Floating cart button appears after adding item with count, (7) Location selector changes menu items dynamically, (8) Mobile responsiveness at 375px - all elements stack, category tabs scroll horizontally, no overflow. Console shows 404 errors for some resources but these don't affect functionality.

hero_section.heading: Working - 'Our Menu.' with Outfit font
hero_section.subtitle: Working - 'Fresh ingredients, family recipes, and honest cooking — all in one place.'
hero_section.location_selector: Working - pill-shaped with MapPin icon, changes menu items
hero_section.status_pill: Working - green 'Ordering Open' with pulse animation

category_bar.sticky: Working - stays visible on scroll with backdrop-blur-xl
category_bar.sort_dropdown: Working - A-Z, Price Low, Price High

menu_item_card.image: Working - 4:3 aspect ratio with lazy loading
menu_item_card.name: Working - Outfit font, font-medium
